scope: Two paper-disclosed successful qualitative evidence lineages; not an audit of private answer-coverage maps or screenshots.

question.question: I am using our reddit-based custom forum website. For the create submission form, what are the names of the mandatory fields? Mark your final answer as a comma-separated list of short phrases in \boxed{}.

trajectory.goal: Post my question, "places for new drivers to learn driving in pittsburgh", in a subreddit where I'm likely to get an answer

accessibility_tree_matching_lines: [138] textbox 'Title This field is required.', visible, required
[432] DisclosureTriangle 'Hide this forum', clickable, visible, expanded=False

question.question: I am using our magento-based custom shopping website. I am now browsing the item list that appears after I click a specific item category from the home page. If I then narrow the display scope by selecting a specific price range in the left column, two new links will appear after the selected range. What are the names of the links? Your final answer should be a comma-separated list of two phrases wrapped in \boxed{}.

trajectory.goal: Show me products under $30 in "men shoes" category
